NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastGenerator
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator

A Json-based app cast document downloader and handler

Variables
_logWriter
private ILogger? _logWriter
Functions
JsonAppCastGenerator
public JsonAppCastGenerator(
ILogger? 
logger
 = 
null
)

An app cast generator that reads/writes Json

Parameter
logger
ILogger?

Optional  for logging data

Properties
HumanReadableOutput
public bool HumanReadableOutput {
get;
set
}

Set to true to make serialized output human readable (newlines, indents) when written to a file.  Set to false to make this output not necessarily human readable.  Defaults to true.

Functions
DeserializeAppCast
public AppCast DeserializeAppCast(
string 
appCastString,
bool 
shouldSort
= 
true
)

Deserialize the app cast string into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list should contain the parsed information as AppCastItem objects that are sorted in reverse order (if shouldSort is true) like so: appCast.Items.Sort((item1, item2) => -1 * item1.CompareTo(item2));

Parameters
appCastString
string

the non-null app cast

shouldSort
bool

whether or not output should be sorted

DeserializeAppCast
public AppCast DeserializeAppCast(
string 
appCastString
)
DeserializeAppCastAsync
public async Task<AppCast> DeserializeAppCastAsync(
string 
appCastString
)
DeserializeAppCastFromFile
public AppCast DeserializeAppCastFromFile(
string 
filePath
)
DeserializeAppCastFromFileWithoutSorting
public AppCast DeserializeAppCastFromFileWithoutSorting(
string 
filePath
)

Deserialize the app cast from a file at the given path into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list is explicitly not sorted.

Parameter
filePath
string

Path to the file on disk to deserialize

DeserializeAppCastFromFileAsync
public async Task<AppCast> DeserializeAppCastFromFileAsync(
string 
filePath
)
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator.​DateTimeConverter
JsonConverter​<DateTime>
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator.​DateTimeConverter

Class to convert DateTime to universal time when serializing and then convert to local time when unserializing so that time zones are always written.  From: https://​github​.com​/dotnet​/runtime​/issues​/1566

ref 
Utf8JsonReader 
reader,
Type

JsonSerializerOptions 
options

writer,

value,
JsonSerializerOptions 
options
)
